effect.content: Primary: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease." Alternate: "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."

rule_text: Mechanism-of-action copy must be used verbatim. Primary: "Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease." Alternate: "...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position."
intent: Preserve MLR-approved mechanism-of-action wording and DM abbreviation usage.
summary: Use mechanism-of-action copy verbatim: Primary "targets root cause of DM," alternate "turns off specific inflammatory switches stuck 'on'.
